because.text: Adjudicated: round-1 closures confirmed item by item; P1-R real and the maintainer over-claim conceded on the record (the DeepSeek response said the selftest covered both key-state scoping directions - it did not; that response blob stays pinned as evidence of 869243ae, this warrant is the correction). Fix one step past the remedy: governance set derives only from the authorized lineage AND the key-state warrant must satisfy the cited policy's quorum - per Warrant s5.1 an unauthorized key-state record is an invalid record, not a conflict. Rev 2 refused on shape; rev 3 refuses on the authorized event. Selftest 20->22, both P1-R directions pinned. Focus-1 (no spurious freeze below quorum) and focus-2 (replay closed; the residual WAS P1-R) adopted. Review quota met: 3 blind families + 1 verification, zero open findings. Adoption blocked on exactly one input the maintainer must not supply for itself: the founder's initial roster and threshold.

subject.note: Kimi k2.6 ADR-007 rev 2 verification pass: close P1-R and ADOPT
